# AGENT_CONTEXT — @brandos/brand-intelligence

**Layer:** L6 — Brand Intelligence
**Maturity:** L5 (V2 fully active; deprecated methods fully removed)
**Build order position:** 13 of 16
**Last updated:** Cleanup Sprint 2 — deprecated methods removed from runtime + interface

---

## Package Purpose

Cognitive identity runtime. Single source of truth for brand signal learning, identity resolution, and brand context injection. Accumulates brand memory from scored artifacts and resolves that memory into actionable generation context.

---

## Responsibilities

| Domain | Module |
|---|---|
| Brand cognition runtime singleton | `src/runtime/BrandIntelligenceRuntime.ts` |
| Brand context resolution | `src/runtime/resolver.ts` |
| Brand signal learning | `src/signals/` |
| Style projection | `src/projection/StyleProjectionResolver.ts` |
| Topic profile | `src/projection/TopicProfileResolver.ts` |
| Signal repository (V2) | `src/repository/SupabaseBrandSignalRepository.ts` |
| Brand memory entries (V2) | `src/memory/BrandMemoryServiceV2.ts` |
| Degraded cognition context factory | `src/factories/createDegradedCognitionContext.ts` |
| Signal repository factory | `src/factories/createBrandSignalRepository.ts` |
| Runtime factory | `src/factories/initBrandIntelligenceRuntime.ts` |

---

## What Was Removed (Cleanup Sprint 2)

**`updatePersonaProfile()`** — removed from `BrandIntelligenceRuntime` class and from `IBrandIntelligenceRuntime` interface in `src/runtime/types.ts`.
- Was `@deprecated Fix G1`. Now fully deleted.
- Persona persistence belongs in `@brandos/auth`.

**`resolvePersonaContribution()`** — removed from `BrandIntelligenceRuntime` class and from `IBrandIntelligenceRuntime` interface.
- Was `@deprecated Fix G2`. Now fully deleted.
- `PersonaContributor` in OCL owns all persona assembly with no BI delegation.
- Also removed from `IBrandRuntimeServices` in `@brandos/contracts` (WS3).

Agents must not re-add these methods or add callers of them.

---

## Non-Responsibilities

- AI provider calls
- Persona assembly for prompts (OCL `PersonaContributor` owns this)
- Artifact compilation or governance
- Auth or session management
- Any direct UI concerns

---

## Public Contracts

Import from `@brandos/brand-intelligence` only. No subpath imports.

### CPL-safe exports (use ONLY these when calling from CPL or apps/web)

```typescript
import {
  getGlobalBrandIntelligenceRuntime,
  initBrandIntelligenceRuntime,
  createDegradedCognitionContext,
  createBrandSignalRepository,
} from '@brandos/brand-intelligence'
```

### Type-only imports

```typescript
import type {
  IBrandCognitionRuntime,
  IBrandIntelligenceRuntime,
  BrandIntelligenceConfig,
  BrandIntelligenceResolution,
  IBrandSignalRepository,
  IBrandMemorySignal,
  BrandSignalType,
  StyleDirective,
  TopicProfile,
} from '@brandos/brand-intelligence'
```

### Runtime method surface (IBrandIntelligenceRuntime — post Cleanup Sprint 2)

```typescript
interface IBrandIntelligenceRuntime {
  // Core resolution
  resolve(request: IBrandCognitionRequest): Promise<IBrandCognitionContext>
  getBrandSummary(params: { workspaceId: string; personaId?: string }): Promise<BrandSummary>

  // Signal learning
  recordArtifactObservation(request: IArtifactObservationRequest | IObservationEvent): Promise<void>
  getMemory(workspaceId: string, classification?: SignalClassification): Promise<IBrandMemorySignal[]>
  review(workspaceId: string, entryId: string, approved: boolean, reviewedBy: string): Promise<void>

  // Identity resolution
  resolveBrandContext(campaignId: string, personaId?: string): Promise<BrandIntelligenceResolution>
}
// NOTE: updatePersonaProfile() and resolvePersonaContribution() NO LONGER EXIST
```

## Dependencies

| Package | Reason |
|---|---|
| `@brandos/contracts` | `IBrandCognitionRuntime`, V2 signal types, `IBrandCognitionRequest`, `IObservationEvent`, `SignalClassification`, identity types |
| `@brandos/shared-utils` | `Logger`, `withRetry` |
| `@supabase/supabase-js` | `SupabaseClient` for `SupabaseBrandSignalRepository` |

### Forbidden Imports

```
@brandos/control-plane-layer   — BI is consumed BY CPL, not the reverse
@brandos/ai-runtime-layer      — BI does not make LLM calls
@brandos/output-control-layer  — data flows to OCL via ResolvedGenerationContract
@brandos/governance-layer      — governance is downstream
@brandos/artifact-engine-layer — artifact pipeline is downstream
react, next                    — server-side only package
```

---

## Consumers

| Consumer | What they use |
|---|---|
| `@brandos/control-plane-layer` | CPL-safe exports only (factory functions + interface types) |

**No other package imports from `@brandos/brand-intelligence`.** `apps/web` accesses BI exclusively via CPL proxy functions (`getBrandMemory`, `recordBrandMemoryObservation`, `reviewBrandMemorySignal`, `resolveBrandCognitionContext`, `getBrandSummary`).

---

## Internal Architecture

```
src/
  index.ts
  IPackage.ts
  validatePackage.ts
  factories/
    createDegradedCognitionContext.ts   ← Fix C3: safe CPL factory
    createBrandSignalRepository.ts      ← Fix C4: safe CPL factory
    initBrandIntelligenceRuntime.ts
  runtime/
    BrandIntelligenceRuntime.ts         ← IBrandIntelligenceRuntime impl
                                          (updatePersonaProfile + resolvePersonaContribution REMOVED)
    types.ts                            ← IBrandIntelligenceRuntime interface
                                          (both deprecated methods removed from interface)
    resolver.ts
    cognition-context.ts
  signals/
    BrandSignalClassifier.ts
    signal-recorder.ts
  memory/
    BrandMemoryServiceV2.ts
  repository/
    SupabaseBrandSignalRepository.ts    ← V2 active; V1 fully retired
  projection/
    StyleProjectionResolver.ts
    TopicProfileResolver.ts
  __tests__/
    runtime.test.ts
    resolver.test.ts
    signals.test.ts
    projection.test.ts
    validatePackage.test.ts
```

### Pre-generation flow

```
CPL → resolveBrandCognitionContext({ workspaceId })    [CPL proxy]
  → BI runtime.resolve({ workspaceId })
       → BrandMemoryServiceV2.getEntries(workspaceId)
       → StyleProjectionResolver.project(entries)
       → TopicProfileResolver.resolve(entries)
       → IBrandCognitionContext { identity, styleDirectives, topicProfile }
  → passed to ContractAssemblerFactory as IdentityContributor input
```

### Post-generation flow (fire-and-forget)

```
CPL → recordBrandMemoryObservation(input)              [CPL proxy]
  → BI runtime.recordArtifactObservation(input)
       → BrandSignalClassifier.classify(score)
       → SupabaseBrandSignalRepository.insert()
```

---

## Invariants

**I-1 — V2 is the active signal system.** `SupabaseBrandSignalRepository` (V2). V1 fully retired.

**I-2 — CPL imports only factory functions and interface types.** No concrete class imports (Fix C3, Fix C4).

**I-3 — `updatePersonaProfile()` is gone.** Do not re-add. Persona persistence is in `@brandos/auth`.

**I-4 — `resolvePersonaContribution()` is gone.** Do not re-add. `PersonaContributor` in OCL owns persona assembly with no BI delegation.

**I-5 — `apps/web` does not import this package directly.** All `apps/web` BI access goes through CPL proxy functions.

**I-6 — Signal records are immutable once persisted.** New observations create new records.

**I-7 — `recordArtifactObservation()` is fire-and-forget.** Failures caught and logged; never surface to user.

**I-8 — `createDegradedCognitionContext()` must always succeed.** Never throws.

---

## Safe Changes

- Bug fixes to `StyleProjectionResolver` or `TopicProfileResolver`
- Adding new signal classification thresholds in `BrandSignalClassifier`
- Improving `resolve()` merge logic
- Extending `IBrandCognitionContext` with new optional fields
- Adding new exports to `src/index.ts` (factory functions or type-only)

---

## Dangerous Changes

- Changing `resolve()` output shape — propagates through CPL → IdentityContributor → prompt
- Changing `IBrandIntelligenceRuntime` interface — CPL depends on this
- Modifying `SupabaseBrandSignalRepository` schema — requires DB migration
- Re-adding `updatePersonaProfile()` or `resolvePersonaContribution()` — violates G1/G2

---

## Test Strategy

**Test runner:** Vitest
**Location:** `src/__tests__/`

Required: `runtime.test.ts`, `resolver.test.ts`, `signals.test.ts`, `projection.test.ts`, `validatePackage.test.ts`.

Ensure tests do NOT call or mock `updatePersonaProfile()` or `resolvePersonaContribution()` — these no longer exist.

None from previous sprint remaining. All G1/G2 debt resolved.

## Current Migration Status

**Fix G1 (Complete):** `updatePersonaProfile()` fully removed from class and interface.

**Fix G2 (Complete):** `resolvePersonaContribution()` fully removed from class and interface. Also removed from `IBrandRuntimeServices` in `@brandos/contracts` (WS3).

**V1 → V2 (Complete):** V1 repository fully retired.

**Fix C3 + C4 (Complete):** CPL uses factory functions.

## Agent Instructions

1. Read this file.
2. Confirm new exports are factory functions or type-only (no concrete classes).
3. Do NOT add `updatePersonaProfile()`, `resolvePersonaContribution()`, or any BI method that OCL or apps/web should own.
4. Run `pnpm test` and `node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs`.
5. If extending `IBrandCognitionContext`, update `IdentityContributor` in OCL to consume the new field.
